# Sprint 🏃

> 90-day daily coding prep system — Python · DSA · FastAPI  
> 90 minutes a day. One lesson. One problem. One endpoint.

---

## What Is This?

**Sprint** is a structured, auto-generated daily study program covering three tracks in parallel:

| Track | Focus | Daily Time |
|-------|-------|------------|
| Python | Core language, OOP, async, stdlib | 25 min |
| DSA | NeetCode problems (Easy → Hard) | 35 min |
| FastAPI | Routing → Auth → Databases → Deploy | 25 min |

Every day ends with a **combined task** that uses the Python concept and DSA solution inside a real FastAPI endpoint.

---

## Repo Structure

```
sprint/
├── README.md               ← You are here
├── ROADMAP.md              ← Full 90-day curriculum pathway
├── progress.json           ← Auto-updated daily tracker
│
├── days/                   ← Daily lesson files (like ml-mentor-progress)
│   └── LESSON_YYYY_MM_DD_DAY_NN.md
│
├── python/                 ← Python practice code by topic
│   └── 01_variables_datatypes/
│       └── practice.py
│
├── dsa/                    ← DSA solutions by category
│   └── arrays/
│       └── 01_two_sum.py
│
└── fastapi/                ← FastAPI mini-projects by concept
    └── 01_hello_world/
        └── main.py
```

---

## How to Follow Along

1. Open today's lesson in `days/`
2. Work through all 3 blocks (~90 min total)
3. Check off the checklist at the bottom of the lesson
4. Commit your practice code in the relevant folder

---

## Phases at a Glance

| Phase | Days | Level |
|-------|------|-------|
| Foundations | 1–30 | Python basics · Easy DSA · FastAPI core |
| Intermediate | 31–60 | OOP/async · Medium DSA · DB + Auth |
| Advanced | 61–90 | Patterns · Hard DSA · Deploy + Testing |

See [ROADMAP.md](./ROADMAP.md) for the full day-by-day breakdown.

---

## Progress

Track via `progress.json` — updated automatically each run.
